title: astragalus accidens var. accidens
intro: Astragalus accidens var. accidens, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Mongolia and China. It is valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which have been traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being. The health benefits of Astragalus accidens var. accidens include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to protect against oxidative stress, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Astragalus accidens var. accidens include dried roots and rhizomes, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
